_instructions._readme: Landing pages data for contractor/roofer/remodeler websites. Each landing page targets a specific service. Fill CLIENT DATA fields manually. Leave AI COPY fields as [PLACEHOLDER] — the agent writes them based on your client data.
_instructions._client_data: Fill these manually: name and slug
_instructions._ai_copy: Leave these as [PLACEHOLDER] — the agent writes them
_instructions.images: Just the filename with extension, no path. E.g. masonry-hero.jpg
_instructions.section_paragraphs: 3 paragraphs per section, min 50 words, max 60 words each

__CLIENT_DATA__: ─── Fill name + slug per landing page ───
